Title: Aurora-Class Shuttle
Overview: The Aurora-Class Shuttle is a small ship used for short trips between nearby planets and stations.
Notes: The Aurora-Class is reliable and easy to maintain, making it the everyday shuttle of the fleet.

Title: Zephyr-Class Transit
Overview: The Zephyr-Class is a compact vessel designed for rapid transit between orbital stations and planetary surfaces.
Notes: The Zephyr-Class is a dependable workhorse, frequently used as an orbital commuter for the fleet.

Title: Nebula-Heavy-Lifter
Overview: The Nebula is a massive industrial vessel built for hauling heavy construction materials between star systems.
Notes: The backbone of galactic infrastructure, the Nebula is slow but virtually unstoppable.

Title: Stellar-Cargo-Hauler
Overview: A high-capacity freighter designed for the long-distance transport of bulk goods and commercial freight.
Notes: Optimized for volume over speed, it is the primary vessel for Galactic Voyages logistics.

Title: Pathfinder-Class Scout
Overview: A nimble, stealth-focused ship used for charting unknown sectors and deep-space exploration.
Notes: The fastest ship in the fleet, often the first to arrive at a new planetary discovery.

Title: Interceptor-Class Guardian
Overview: A fast, agile security vessel designed for fleet protection and rapid response to distress signals.
Notes: Primarily deployed in high-risk zones to ensure safe passage for civilian shuttles.

Title: Celestial-Cruise-Liner
Overview: An opulent passenger vessel offering premium travel experiences between core galactic hubs.
Notes: The pinnacle of luxury travel, where the journey is more important than the destination.

Title: Resolute-Medical-Frigate
Overview: A specialized mobile hospital ship equipped with advanced surgical suites and stasis pods.
Notes: A critical asset for disaster relief and long-range fleet support missions.

Title: Asteroid-Miner-Extractor
Overview: An industrial-grade mining platform used for extracting rare minerals from asteroid belts and moons.
Notes: Designed for durability in harsh, debris-filled environments.

Title: Horizon-Class Private Yacht
Overview: A high-end private vessel designed for elite travelers seeking speed and exclusivity in their transit.
Notes: Often used by executives for rapid travel between planetary estates.
